content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ "401" ∧ edge_reject
P: widen_window ∧ provider_skew_only ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test
V: valid_webhook_passes ∧ stale_still_401
A: patch_tolerance ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and "401" and edge_reject.
Plan: widen_window and provider_skew_only and min_fix and reg_test.
Verify: valid_webhook_passes and stale_still_401.
Answer target: patch_tolerance and add_reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: overdue_middleware ∧ charge_loop
V: boundary_test ∧ reg_test
A: patch_rule ∧ add_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: min_fix.
Constraints: overdue_middleware and charge_loop.
Verify: boundary_test and reg_test.
Answer target: patch_rule and add_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: propose_arch
C: team_"9" ∧ ddl_"12 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ traffic_steady ∧ ops_platform_plus_sec
P: compliance_ready ∧ short_why
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ uses_"PostgreSQL"
A: modular_monolith ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ ci_cd ∧ audit_logs ∧ rbac

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team:"6" ∧ ddl:"9 weeks" ∧ store:"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ postgres_queue ∧ reuse_store
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ low_ops
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_risk
C: user_input ∧ ".." ∧ "download" ∧ no_sanitization
P: validate_filename ∧ resolve_path ∧ enforce_basedir ∧ reject_traversal
V: path_within_basedir ∧ no_".."_sequences ∧ whitelist_match
A: patch_handler ∧ add_tests ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal_risk.
Constraints: user_input and ".." and "download" and no_sanitization.
Plan: validate_filename and resolve_path and enforce_basedir and reject_traversal.
Verify: path_within_basedir and no_".."_sequences and whitelist_match.
Answer target: patch_handler and add_tests and audit_logs.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: invoice_admin_api ∧ "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat
P: sql_injection ∧ unsafe_orderby ∧ data_exfiltration
V: whitelist_sort ∧ parameterize ∧ reject_unknown
A: patch_query ∧ add_allowlist ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: invoice_admin_api and "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat.
Plan: sql_injection and unsafe_orderby and data_exfiltration.
Verify: whitelist_sort and parameterize and reject_unknown.
Answer target: patch_query and add_allowlist and audit_logs.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: has_anchors ∧ "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)"
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: preserve_order ∧ minimal_change ∧ db_err_calls_"next(err)"
A: convert_to_async_await ∧ await_db.fetchRows ∧ await_db.save ∧ try_catch_"next(err)" ∧ keep_emit_metrics

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_passes_"next(err)" ∧ async_await_used
A: apply_refactor ∧ preserve_order ∧ wrap_try_catch ∧ "next(err)"_on_db_err
